markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

Weekly sync between ProjectMark and GrowthX Labs to discuss content strategy, SEO performance, and next steps for organic growth.

## Key Takeaways

  - [Impressions have significantly increased since late December, but click-through rate (CTR) remains low at 0.4% (target: at least 1%)](https://fathom.video/share/_coL-9xru4zkTEHmaBUFs-YRNxTs-131?tab=summary&timestamp=31.0)
  - [Content refresh strategy implemented for 20 articles, adding new sections like activities, CTAs, and FAQs](https://fathom.video/share/_coL-9xru4zkTEHmaBUFs-YRNxTs-131?tab=summary&timestamp=247.0)
  - [Team to focus on improving meta descriptions and titles to boost CTR, especially for high-impression articles](https://fathom.video/share/_coL-9xru4zkTEHmaBUFs-YRNxTs-131?tab=summary&timestamp=684.0)
  - Backlog review needed to remove irrelevant articles and prioritize content with search volume potential

## Topics

### SEO Performance Analysis

  - [Impressions increased significantly since late December (4,017 impressions, 7 clicks in the past week)](https://fathom.video/share/_coL-9xru4zkTEHmaBUFs-YRNxTs-131?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [CTR remains low at 0.4%, target is at least 1%](https://fathom.video/share/_coL-9xru4zkTEHmaBUFs-YRNxTs-131?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Highest performing blog: 4,774 impressions (construction sales process)](https://fathom.video/share/_coL-9xru4zkTEHmaBUFs-YRNxTs-131?tab=summary&timestamp=46.0)
  - [20 refreshed articles showing promise, added sections:](https://fathom.video/share/_coL-9xru4zkTEHmaBUFs-YRNxTs-131?tab=summary&timestamp=158.0)
      - [Activities](https://fathom.video/share/_coL-9xru4zkTEHmaBUFs-YRNxTs-131?tab=summary&timestamp=247.0)
      - [CTA prompting website visits](https://fathom.video/share/_coL-9xru4zkTEHmaBUFs-YRNxTs-131?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)
      - [Common mistakes/pitfalls](https://fathom.video/share/_coL-9xru4zkTEHmaBUFs-YRNxTs-131?tab=summary&timestamp=269.0)
      - [FAQs for potential featured snippets](https://fathom.video/share/_coL-9xru4zkTEHmaBUFs-YRNxTs-131?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

### Content Strategy Adjustments

  - [Shifting focus from bottom-of-funnel to include middle and top-of-funnel content](https://fathom.video/share/_coL-9xru4zkTEHmaBUFs-YRNxTs-131?tab=summary&timestamp=551.0)
  - [Aiming for 10-15 published pieces per week to identify what works](https://fathom.video/share/_coL-9xru4zkTEHmaBUFs-YRNxTs-131?tab=summary&timestamp=568.0)
  - [Balancing relevance with search volume potential](https://fathom.video/share/_coL-9xru4zkTEHmaBUFs-YRNxTs-131?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)
  - [New articles added on topics like social media marketing for construction, small business construction CRM, and pre-construction meeting guide](https://fathom.video/share/_coL-9xru4zkTEHmaBUFs-YRNxTs-131?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)

### Backlog and Article Review

  - [37 articles in backlog needing revision](https://fathom.video/share/_coL-9xru4zkTEHmaBUFs-YRNxTs-131?tab=summary&timestamp=407.0)
  - [Some articles (e.g., ProjectMark vs. Unanet, ProjectMark vs. Salesforce) require feedback before publishing](https://fathom.video/share/_coL-9xru4zkTEHmaBUFs-YRNxTs-131?tab=summary&timestamp=365.0)
  - [Team to review and potentially remove irrelevant articles from the backlog](https://fathom.video/share/_coL-9xru4zkTEHmaBUFs-YRNxTs-131?tab=summary&timestamp=414.0)

### Technical SEO Updates

  - [Internal linking process ongoing for older articles (37 remaining)](https://fathom.video/share/_coL-9xru4zkTEHmaBUFs-YRNxTs-131?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)
  - [New articles have proper internal and external linking](https://fathom.video/share/_coL-9xru4zkTEHmaBUFs-YRNxTs-131?tab=summary&timestamp=1006.0)
  - [No major indexing issues, but indexing speed is slow due to crawl budget](https://fathom.video/share/_coL-9xru4zkTEHmaBUFs-YRNxTs-131?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Manual indexing requests have been made, but there are limitations](https://fathom.video/share/_coL-9xru4zkTEHmaBUFs-YRNxTs-131?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)

## Next Steps

  - Gus to review and publish new articles on Webflow
  - [Muhammad to focus on improving meta descriptions and titles, especially for high-impression articles](https://fathom.video/share/_coL-9xru4zkTEHmaBUFs-YRNxTs-131?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Gus to send list of backlog articles to remove or deprioritize](https://fathom.video/share/_coL-9xru4zkTEHmaBUFs-YRNxTs-131?tab=summary&timestamp=939.0)
  - [Muhammad to complete backlinking process for remaining 37 articles](https://fathom.video/share/_coL-9xru4zkTEHmaBUFs-YRNxTs-131?tab=summary&timestamp=980.0)
  - [Team to continue monitoring CTR and implement strategies to increase it to at least 1%](https://fathom.video/share/_coL-9xru4zkTEHmaBUFs-YRNxTs-131?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Aim for 50-100 clicks per day within the next three months](https://fathom.video/share/_coL-9xru4zkTEHmaBUFs-YRNxTs-131?tab=summary&timestamp=573.0)
